title: antirrhinum ramosissimum var. flexuosum
intro: Antirrhinum ramosissimum var. flexuosum, also known as the twisted snapdragon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, Antirrhinum ramosissimum var. flexuosum has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its use as a topical treatment for skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Antirrhinum ramosissimum var. flexuosum often involve infusions, decoctions, and infusions of the dried flowers and leaves, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for medicinal purposes.
